slides.title: Credential Deduplication System
slides.summary: Built a full-stack automation pipeline with n8n and PostgreSQL upsert logic to process CloudSEK credential reports and eliminate redundant records at scale.

slides.title: SOC Alert Monitoring Dashboard
slides.summary: Integrated CrowdStrike APIs into a centralized n8n dashboard to aggregate and enrich security alert metadata, streamlining incident triage for the SOC team.

slides.title: Automated Task Notification System
slides.summary: Engineered a Slack workflow that polls REST APIs every 2 hours and auto-tags assignees for overdue tasks, eliminating missed deadlines across the SOC team.
